commit_scope: Make the Bali living compound design path easy to find from the public home page and /come-in invitation without routing through Bumi Sehat or a deep /silence scroll.

commands: cd web && npm test -- tests/bali-land-path-static.test.ts tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts tests/aligned-communities-static.test.ts (first pass found missing fresh-worktree dependency: vitest)
cd web && npm test -- tests/bali-land-path-static.test.ts tests/homepage-presence-lineage.test.ts tests/aligned-communities-static.test.ts
for f in web/messages/*.json; do jq empty "$f" || exit 1; done
Playwright rendered http://127.0.0.1:3116/ and http://127.0.0.1:3116/come-in and found the new /silence/built entry copy
local_validation.summary: The public home ground band now has a direct Brahmavihara Living Compound doorway beside /come-in, /silence, and /with-us. /come-in now exposes a land-draft card near the top and a localized lower door to /silence/built. The static guard verifies the public entry surfaces keep /silence/built visible and do not route the land path through Bumi Sehat.

ci_validation.details: Pending push, PR checks, and merge verification.

deploy_validation.details: Public web verification will be performed after merge and deploy.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: A land steward arriving from the public home page or /come-in can find the Bali living compound design draft directly, without needing to infer the route by reading all of /silence first.
test_flows: open local / -> see Brahmavihara Living Compound and Walk through /silence/built
open local /come-in -> see Meet the land draft and the localized /silence/built door
static source guard -> no Bumi Sehat in the public land-entry path

phase_gate.reason: Local proof is complete; commit, push, PR, checks, merge, and public verification remain pending.
